protocol_notes: User is 29 years old. Started experiencing GI issues in early 20s due to stress over ex-partner, progressed to severe anxiety and panic disorder. Prescribed Cymbalta (SNRI antidepressant) approximately 2 years ago; GERD and IBS symptoms resolved within weeks. Currently tapering off Cymbalta and considering BPC-157 to manage potential withdrawal effects and prevent return of GI symptoms. Word of mouth suggests BPC-157 may help with antidepressant discontinuation.
